have h₁ : Function.Injective χ.solsInclQuadSols := by
    intro S T h
    have h₂ := S.cubicSol
    have h₃ := T.cubicSol
    have h₄ : (χ.cubicACC) S.val = 0 := by
      simpa [S.val] using h₂
    have h₅ : (χ.cubicACC) T.val = 0 := by
      simpa [T.val] using h₃
    -- Since the cubic condition is the same, we can use it to show injectivity.
    have h₆ : S.toQuadSols = T.toQuadSols := by
      exact h
    have h₇ : S = T := by
      apply Subtype.ext
      <;> simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;> aesop
    exact h₇
  
  have h₂ : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsInclLinSols := by
    intro S T h
    have h₃ : S.toLinSols = T.toLinSols := by
      exact h
    have h₄ : S = T := by
      apply Subtype.ext
      <;> simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;> aesop
    exact h₄
  
  -- Use the injectivity of the compositions to show injectivity of solsInclLinSols.
  exact Function.Injective.comp h₂ h₁

  have h' := congr_arg (fun x => (χ.linSolsIncl x : χ.Charges)) h
  have h'' : χ.linSolsIncl (χ.solsInclLinSols S) = χ.linSolsIncl (χ.solsInclLinSols T) := by simpa using h'
  have h''' : (S : χ.Charges) = (T : χ.Charges) := by
    calc
      (S : χ.Charges) = χ.linSolsIncl (χ.solsInclLinSols S) := by
        simp [χ.solsInclLinSols, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols]
        <;> simp_all [Sols.ext_iff, accredited]
        <;> simp_all [S.val]
        <;> rfl
      _ = χ.linSolsIncl (χ.solsInclLinSols T) := by rw [h'']
      _ = (T : χ.Charges) := by
        simp [χ.solsInclLinSols, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols]
        <;> simp_all [Sols.ext_iff, accredited]
        <;> simp_all [T.val]
        <;> rfl
  have h'''' : S = T := by
    have h''''' : (S : χ.Charges) = (T : χ.Charges) := h'''
    have h'''''' : S.val = T.val := by
      simpa [χ.solsInclLinSols, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols] using h'''''
    exact Sols.ext h''''''
  exact h''''

have h_main : Function.Injective (fun S : χ.Sols => (S.toQuadSols.toLinSols : χ.LinSols)) := by
    intro S T h
    have h₁ : (S.toQuadSols.toLinSols : χ.LinSols) = (T.toQuadSols.toLinSols : χ.LinSols) := h
    have h₂ : S.toQuadSols.toLinSols.val = T.toQuadSols.toLinSols.val := by
      rw [h₁]
    have h₃ : S.val = T.val := by
      have h₄ : S.toQuadSols.toLinSols.val = S.val := by
        simp [QuadSols.ext_iff, LinSols.ext_iff]
        <;> rfl
      have h₅ : T.toQuadSols.toLinSols.val = T.val := by
        simp [QuadSols.ext_iff, LinSols.ext_iff]
        <;> rfl
      simp_all
    exact Sols.ext h₃
  -- Since `χ.solsInclLinSols` is exactly the function `fun S : χ.Sols => (S.toQuadSols.toLinSols : χ.LinSols)`,
  -- we can directly use `h_main` to conclude the injectivity.
  simpa [solsInclLinSols] using h_main

intro S T h
  have h₁ : χ.solsInclLinSols S = χ.solsInclLinSols T := h
  have h₂ : S.toQuadSols.toLinSols = T.toQuadSols.toLinSols := by
    simpa [χ.solsInclLinSols] using h₁
  have h₃ : S.toQuadSols = T.toQuadSols := by
    have h₄ : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsInclLinSols := by
      intro x y hxy
      have h₅ : χ.quadSolsInclLinSols x = χ.quadSolsInclLinSols y := hxy
      have h₆ : (x : χ.LinSols) = (y : χ.LinSols) := by
        simpa [χ.quadSolsInclLinSols] using h₅
      exact by
        cases x <;> cases y <;> simp_all [QuadSols.ext_iff] <;> try contradiction <;> try simp_all
        <;>
        (try
          {
            have h₇ := x₁
            simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
            <;>
            (try contradiction)
            <;>
            (try simp_all)
          })
        <;>
        (try
          {
            have h₇ := x₂
            simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
            <;>
            (try contradiction)
            <;>
            (try simp_all)
          })
    exact h₄ (by simpa [χ.quadSolsInclLinSols] using h₂)
  have h₄ : S = T := by
    cases S <;> cases T <;> simp_all [Sols.ext_iff]
    <;>
    (try contradiction)
    <;>
    (try simp_all)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        have h₅ := x₂
        simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
        <;>
        (try contradiction)
        <;>
        (try simp_all)
      })
  exact h₄

intro A B h
  -- Use the injectivity of quadSolsInclLinSols and solsInclQuadSols to prove injectivity of solsInclLinSols
  have h₁ : A.toQuadSols = B.toQuadSols := by
    have h₂ : (χ.solsInclQuadSols A).toLinSols = (χ.solsInclQuadSols B).toLinSols := by
      simpa [solsInclLinSols, MulActionHom.toFun_eq] using congr_arg (fun x => (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols x).toLinSols) h
    -- Since quadSolsInclLinSols is injective, we can conclude that A.toQuadSols = B.toQuadSols
    have h₃ : Function.Injective χ.solsInclQuadSols := inferInstance
    have h₄ : χ.solsInclQuadSols A = χ.solsInclQuadSols B := by
      apply h₃
      simpa [solsInclQuadSols, MulActionHom.toFun_eq] using h₂
    simpa [solsInclQuadSols, MulActionHom.toFun_eq] using h₄
  -- Since solsInclQuadSols is injective, we can conclude that A = B
  have h₂ : Function.Injective χ.solsInclQuadSols := inferInstance
  have h₃ : A = B := by
    apply h₂
    simpa [solsInclQuadSols, MulActionHom.toFun_eq] using h₁
  exact h₃

intro a b h
  have h₁ : a.toQuadSols.toLinSols = b.toQuadSols.toLinSols := by
    simpa [χ.solsInclLinSols] using congr_arg (fun x => x.val) h
  have h₂ : a.toQuadSols = b.toQuadSols := by
    have h₃ : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsInclLinSols := by
      apply quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
    exact h₃ (by simpa [χ.solsInclLinSols] using h₁)
  have h₃ : a = b := by
    have h₄ : a.val = b.val := by
      simpa [χ.solsInclLinSols] using congr_arg (fun x => x.val) h₂
    have h₅ : ∃ (sol : χ.Sols), sol.val = a.val := ⟨a, rfl⟩
    have h₆ : ∃ (sol : χ.Sols), sol.val = b.val := ⟨b, rfl⟩
    cases' a with a_val _
    cases' b with b_val _
    simp_all [Sols.ext_iff]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [QuadSols.ext_iff, LinSols.ext_iff, ACCSystem.ext_iff]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try
      {
        have h₇ := a_val.2.2
        have h₈ := b_val.2.2
        simp_all [LinearMap.map_smul]
      })
  exact h₃

have h₁ : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsInclLinSols := by
    -- Prove that the inclusion from QuadSols to LinSols is injective
    exact inferInstance
  have h₂ : Function.Injective χ.solsInclQuadSols := by
    -- Prove that the inclusion from Sols to QuadSols is injective
    exact inferInstance
  -- Since both inclusions are injective, their composition is also injective
  have h₃ : Function.Injective (fun S : χ.Sols => (χ.solsInclQuadSols S).toLinSols) := by
    intro S₁ S₂ h
    have h₄ : (χ.solsInclQuadSols S₁).toLinSols = (χ.solsInclQuadSols S₂).toLinSols := h
    have h₅ : (χ.solsInclQuadSols S₁) = (χ.solsInclQuadSols S₂) := by
      apply Sols.ext
      simp_all [Sols.ne_zero]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [ACCSystem.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [Quadratic.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    have h₆ : S₁ = S₂ := by
      apply h₂
      simpa using h₅
    exact h₆
  -- The composition of the two injective functions is injective
  have h₄ : Function.Injective χ.solsInclLinSols := by
    intro S₁ S₂ h
    have h₅ : χ.solsInclLinSols S₁ = χ.solsInclLinSols S₂ := h
    have h₆ : (χ.solsInclLinSols S₁).toLinSols = (χ.solsInclLinSols S₂).toLinSols := by simpa using h₅
    have h₇ : (χ.solsInclQuadSols S₁).toLinSols = (χ.solsInclQuadSols S₂).toLinSols := by
      simp_all [MulActionHom.map_smul]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [ACCSystem.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try simp_all [Quadratic.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try aesop)
    have h₈ : S₁ = S₂ := by
      have h₉ : Function.Injective (fun S : χ.Sols => (χ.solsInclQuadSols S).toLinSols) := h₃
      exact h₉ h₇
    exact h₈
  exact h₄

intro S T h
  have h₁ : S.val = T.val := by
    have h₂ : (χ.solsInclLinSols S : χ.LinSols) = (χ.solsInclLinSols T : χ.LinSols) := by simpa using h
    have h₃ : (χ.solsInclLinSols S : χ.LinSols) = (S : χ.LinSols) := by simp [χ.solsInclLinSols]
    have h₄ : (χ.solsInclLinSols T : χ.LinSols) = (T : χ.LinSols) := by simp [χ.solsInclLinSols]
    rw [h₃] at h₂
    rw [h₄] at h₂
    exact by
      simpa [ACCSystemLinear.LinSols.ext_iff] using h₂
  have h₂ : S = T := by
    apply Sols.ext h₁
  exact h₂

  have h2 : Function.Injective (⇑(χ.solsInclQuadSols)) := by

    apply χ.solsInclQuadSols_injective
  have h2 : Function.Injective (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols → χ.LinSols) := by

    apply Function.Injective.comp h2 h1
  have h4 : (χ.solsInclLinSols : χ.Sols → χ.LinSols) = (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols → χ.LinSols) ∘ (χ.solsInclQuadSols : χ.Sols → χ.QuadSols) := by
    ext S
    simp [χ.solsInclLinSols, χ.solsInclQuadSols, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols]

have h₁ : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsInclLinSols := by
    intro A B h
    have h₂ : (A : χ.LinSols) = (B : χ.LinSols) := by simpa using h
    exact Subtype.ext h₂
  have h₂ : Function.Injective χ.solsInclQuadSols := by
    intro A B h
    have h₃ : (A : χ.QuadSols) = (B : χ.QuadSols) := by simpa using h
    exact Subtype.ext h₃
  have h₃ : Function.Injective (χ.solsInclLinSols : χ.Sols → χ.LinSols) := by
    intro A B h
    have h₄ : (A : χ.LinSols) = (B : χ.LinSols) := by simpa using h
    have h₅ : (A : χ.LinSols) = (B : χ.LinSols) := by simpa using h
    have h₆ : (A : χ.Sols).toLinSols = (B : χ.Sols).toLinSols := by
      simpa [χ.solsInclLinSols] using h
    have h₇ : (A : χ.Sols).toQuadSols = (B : χ.Sols).toQuadSols := by
      have h₈ : (χ.solsInclQuadSols : χ.Sols → χ.QuadSols) A = (χ.solsInclQuadSols : χ.Sols → χ.QuadSols) B := by
        have h₉ : (χ.solsInclLinSols : χ.Sols → χ.LinSols) A = (χ.solsInclLinSols : χ.Sols → χ.LinSols) B := h
        have h₁₀ : (χ.solsInclLinSols : χ.Sols → χ.LinSols) A = (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols → χ.LinSols) (χ.solsInclQuadSols A) := by simp [χ.solsInclLinSols]
        have h₁₁ : (χ.solsInclLinSols : χ.Sols → χ.LinSols) B = (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols → χ.LinSols) (χ.solsInclQuadSols B) := by simp [χ.solsInclLinSols]
        have h₁₂ : (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols → χ.LinSols) (χ.solsInclQuadSols A) = (χ.quadSolsInclLinSols : χ.QuadSols → χ.LinSols) (χ.solsInclQuadSols B) := by rw [h₉] at h₁₀; simp_all
        rw [h₁₀, h₁₁] at h₉
        exact h₁₂
      simpa [χ.solsInclQuadSols] using h₈
    have h₈ : (A : χ.Sols) = (B : χ.Sols) := by
      have h₉ : (A : χ.Sols).toLinSols = (B : χ.Sols).toLinSols := h₆
      have h₁₀ : (A : χ.Sols).toQuadSols = (B : χ.Sols).toQuadSols := h₇
      exact Subtype.ext (by
        cases' A with A hA
        cases' B with B hB
        simp_all [QuadSols.ext_iff, Sols.ext_iff]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]) <;>
        (try aesop) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try ring_nf at *) <;>
        (try simp_all [LinearMap.map_zero, LinearMap.map_add, LinearMap.map_smul])
        )
    exact h₈
  exact h₃

intro S₁ S₂ h
  have h₁ : (S₁ : χ.LinSols) = (S₂ : χ.LinSols) := by
    -- Extract the underlying linear solutions from S₁ and S₂
    have h₂ : (S₁ : χ.LinSols) = (S₂ : χ.LinSols) := by
      -- Use the fact that the inclusion into linear solutions is injective
      simpa [solsInclLinSols] using h
    exact h₂
  -- Convert the equality of linear solutions back to quadratic solutions
  have h₂ : S₁ = S₂ := by
    -- Use the injectivity of the inclusion from quadratic to linear solutions
    have h₃ : S₁.toQuadSols = S₂.toQuadSols := by
      -- Since the linear part is injective, the quadratic part must also be equal
      have h₄ : (S₁.toQuadSols : χ.LinSols) = (S₂.toQuadSols : χ.LinSols) := by
        -- Convert to linear solutions and use the injectivity of the linear inclusion
        exact h₁
      -- Use the injectivity of the inclusion from quadratic to linear solutions
      exact by
        have h₅ : (S₁.toQuadSols : χ.LinSols) = (S₂.toQuadSols : χ.LinSols) := h₄
        -- Since the linear parts are equal, the quadratic parts are also equal
        have h₆ : S₁.toQuadSols.val = S₂.toQuadSols.val := by
          simpa [quadSolsInclLinSols] using h₅
        -- Use the injectivity of the valuation map to conclude
        have h₇ : S₁.toQuadSols = S₂.toQuadSols := by
          apply ACCSystemQuad.QuadSols.ext
          simpa using h₆
        exact h₇
    -- Now we have that the quadratic parts are equal, so the solutions are equal
    have h₄ : S₁ = S₂ := by
      -- Use the fact that the quadratic parts are equal to conclude
      have h₅ : S₁.toQuadSols = S₂.toQuadSols := h₃
      have h₆ : S₁.val = S₂.val := by
        -- Extract the underlying charges
        simpa [Sols.val] using congr_arg (fun x : χ.QuadSols => x.val) h₅
      -- Use the injectivity of the valuation map to conclude
      have h₇ : S₁ = S₂ := by
        apply Sols.ext
        simpa using h₆
      exact h₇
    exact h₄
  -- Conclude that S₁ = S₂
  exact h₂

have h1 : Function.Injective χ.solsInclQuadSols := by
    exact solsInclQuadSols_injective χ
  have h2 : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsInclLinSols := by
    exact quadSolsInclLinSols_injective χ
  have h3 : Function.Injective χ.solsInclLinSols := by
    have h4 : χ.solsInclLinSols = χ.quadSolsInclLinSols.comp χ.solsInclQuadSols := by
      rfl
    rw [h4]
    exact Function.Injective.comp h2 h1
  exact h3

    sorry
  
  have h₂ : Function.Injective χ.solsInclQuadSols := by
    sorry
  
  have h₃ : Function.Injective χ.solsInclLinSols := by

    have h₃₂ : Function.Injective χ.solsInclLinSols := by
      intro S T h
      have h₃₃ : χ.solsInclLinSols S = χ.solsInclLinSols T := h
      have h₃₄ : (MulActionHom.comp χ.quadSolsInclLinSols χ.solsInclQuadSols) S = (MulActionHom.comp χ.quadSolsInclLinSols χ.solsInclQuadSols) T := by simpa [h₃₁] using h₃₃
      have h₃₅ : χ.quadSolsInclLinSols (χ.solsInclQuadSols S) = χ.quadSolsInclLinSols (χ.solsInclQuadSols T) := by simpa [MulActionHom.comp_apply] using h₃₄
      have h₃₆ : χ.solsInclQuadSols S = χ.solsInclQuadSols T := h₁ h₃₅
      have h₃₇ : S = T := h₂ h₃₆
      exact h₃₇
    exact h₃₂
  
  exact h₃

intro S T h
  have h₁ : χ.solsInclLinSols S = χ.solsInclLinSols T := h
  have h₂ : S.toQuadSols.toLinSols = T.toQuadSols.toLinSols := by
    simpa [χ.solsInclLinSols] using h₁
  have h₃ : S.toQuadSols.toLinSols.val = T.toQuadSols.toLinSols.val := by
    rfl
  have h₄ : S.toQuadSols.val = T.toQuadSols.val := by
    have h₄₁ : S.toQuadSols.toLinSols.val = T.toQuadSols.toLinSols.val := h₃
    have h₄₂ : S.toQuadSols.val = T.toQuadSols.val := by
      simp_all [ACCSystemLinear.LinSols.ext_iff]
    exact h₄₂
  have h₅ : S.val = T.val := by
    have h₅₁ : S.toQuadSols.val = T.toQuadSols.val := h₄
    have h₅₂ : S.val = T.val := by
      simp_all [ACCSystemQuad.QuadSols.ext_iff]
    exact h₅₂
  have h₆ : S = T := by
    have h₆₁ : S.val = T.val := h₅
    have h₆₂ : S = T := by
      simp_all [ACCSystem.Sols.ext_iff]
    exact h₆₂
  exact h₆

intro S T h
  have h₁ : (χ.solsInclLinSols S).val = (χ.solsInclLinSols T).val := by simpa using h
  have h₂ : S.val = T.val := by
    have h₃ : (χ.solsInclLinSols S).val = S.val := by simp [χ.solsInclLinSols, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols]
    have h₄ : (χ.solsInclLinSols T).val = T.val := by simp [χ.solsInclLinSols, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols]
    rw [h₃] at h₁
    rw [h₄] at h₁
    exact h₁
  have h₃ : S = T := by
    apply Sols.ext
    exact h₂
  exact h₃

have h : Function.Injective χ.solsInclLinSols := by
    -- Prove that the inclusion of sols into linSols is injective
    intro S T hst
    have h₁ : S.toQuadSols.toLinSols = T.toQuadSols.toLinSols := by simpa [χ.solsInclLinSols] using hst
    have h₂ : S.toQuadSols.val = T.toQuadSols.val := by
      -- Use the injectivity of the inclusion from quadSols to linSols
      have h₃ : Function.Injective χ.quadSolsInclLinSols := χ.quadSolsInclLinSols_injective
      have h₄ : χ.quadSolsInclLinSols S.toQuadSols = χ.quadSolsInclLinSols T.toQuadSols := by
        simp_all [χ.solsInclQuadSols, χ.quadSolsInclLinSols]
      exact h₃ h₄
    have h₃ : S.val = T.val := by
      -- Use the injectivity of the inclusion from sols to quadSols
      simp_all [Sols.toQuadSols, QuadSols.val]
    -- Use the injectivity of the inclusion from sols to quadSols
    have h₄ : S = T := by
      apply Sols.ext
      <;> simp_all
    exact h₄
  exact h
